title: cymbopogon arundinaceus
intro: Cymbopogon arundinaceus, also known as East Indian lemongrass, is a perennial grass native to tropical Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its numerous medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cymbopogon arundinaceus include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. Cymbopogon arundinaceus can be prepared as an herbal tea, essential oil, or infused oil, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
